scripts.build:next: rm -rf apps/web/out content && npm run strip:hekler && npm run extract:content && npm run sync:redirects && npm run verify:redirects && npm run verify:links && npm run prepare:public && npm --prefix apps/web run build && npm run flatten:ru && npm run verify:next && npm run verify:no-hekler
scripts.dev: npm run extract:content && npm run prepare:public && npm --prefix apps/web run dev
scripts.migrate:react: npm run build:legacy-react && npm run verify:legacy-react
